payload.answer: I can offer choices for how to handle the statement “Nur and Sara are my twin daughters,” without saving it yet.
repair_options: Add this as a new separate family fact: Nur and Sara are your twin daughters.
Keep any existing daughter/children facts and add this as an additional fact, since it may be additive rather than conflicting.
Ask for clarification before saving if there are existing facts about Nur, Sara, or your children that might overlap.
